stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is on an ILS approach to runway 23 using an approach plate with the diagram above. As the pilot is passing 1 500 ft, what lights and audio indications might the pilot see and hear?

options.a: A white light and a continuous series of alternating dots and dashes.
options.b: A blue light and a continuous series of low-frequency dashes.
options.c: A blue light and a continuous series of alternating dots and dashes.
options.d: A white light and a continuous series of low-frequency dashes.
